data.title: PHFA issues RFP for mixed-use development projects with priority for third-class cities; seeks new construction or rehab proposals.
data.description: HARRISBURG, Pa., August 25, 2025 - The Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency has announced that funding preference will be given to proposals from third-class cities. The agency is currently accepting proposals for new construction or rehabilitation of mixed-use projects, with a focus on providing financial support. Interested parties can submit their proposals in response to the Request for Proposals.

data.title: 54% say Trump is doing better than Biden. Inflation top issue for 48%. 54% say Trump's actions justified. 66% want Epstein info. 52% satisfied with Trump.
data.description: In a recent survey, 48% of voters expressed that inflation is their top concern. Interestingly, 54% feel that President Trump's actions in Washington, D.C. are justified and necessary. Moreover, a significant 66% of voters are calling for lawmakers to demand more information from the administration regarding Epstein. On a different note, 52% of voters indicated satisfaction with Trump's performance.

data.title: Hyatt launches restorative retreats for personal renewal in U.S. destinations. Immersive wellbeing journeys with holistic programming. #WorldofHyatt #Retreats_BYHY
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) has introduced Retreats by World of Hyatt, featuring immersive wellbeing experiences in various U.S. locations. These multi-day getaways emphasize community, discovery, and rejuvenation, with holistic activities available in carefully curated settings. Each experience is part of Hyatt's commitment to providing care and comes in convenient, all-inclusive packages, catering to the well-being of the mind, body, and spirit. This initiative aims to inspire guests through seamless booking options and holistic programs at select U.S. destinations.

Sweden in EU: ‘The Sweden Government has decided on a new agreement with the EU to provide SEK 750 million in additional budget support to Ukraine through the EU’s Ukraine Facility. This support will help cover the funding gap in Ukraine’s national budget.’

data.title: Sify Infinit Spaces Limited appoints Dr. Tom Bradicich as Independent Director to its Board. Nasdaq listed Sify Technologies.
data.description: In Chennai, India, on August 25, 2025, the Board of Sify Infinit Spaces Limited, a subsidiary of Sify Technologies Limited listed on Nasdaq under the symbol Sify, appointed Dr. Tom Bradicich as an Independent Director.

data.title: Inventor creates D M J MACHINE for hospitals to automate mop/rag system, from Maple, Ontario, Canada - PRNewswire.
data.description: On August 25, 2025 in Pittsburgh, a hospital worker from Maple, Ontario, Canada, shared about inventing the D M J MACHINE for EVS workers. This invention aimed to streamline the distribution and return process of mops and rags. The innovator expressed the machine's capacity to improve the handling of soiled items efficiently.
Nasdaq 100 Rises 0.1% to Session High After Slightly Recovering From Drop

data.title: Bang & Olufsen initiated a share buyback program on 15 August 2025 to support their share-based incentive programs.
data.description: On 15 August 2025, Bang & Olufsen began a share repurchase program to support the company's share-based long-term incentive plans in line with EU Commission Regulation No. 596/2014 and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052.

data.title: TXNM Energy filed regulatory applications for acquisition by Blackstone Infrastructure, pending approval from NMPRC, PUCT, and Federal Energy...
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Albuquerque, New Mexico, TXNM Energy (NYSE: TXNM) submitted requests for the approval of its acquisition by Blackstone Infrastructure to the New Mexico Public Regulation Commission (NMPRC), Public Utility Commission of Texas (PUCT), and Federal Energy.

data.title: OYE Fest 2025: Atlanta set for music and culture explosion this Oct. Date: October 4th, 2025, featuring top Latin artists.
data.description: Top musicians and immersive Latin culture will take center stage at OYE Fest in downtown Atlanta on Saturday, October 4th, 2025. The highly-anticipated event promises to be a vibrant celebration of Latin music and heritage. Mark your calendars for a must-see experience featuring chart-topping artists, highlighting the best of Latin culture. Get ready to be part of the excitement as the countdown to OYE Fest begins. Don't miss out on this unforgettable event that will showcase the rich diversity of Latin music and ethnicity.

data.title: MedStar Health wins 11 "Healthiest Maryland Business" Awards, setting a new record in 2025.
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, on August 25, 2025, it was announced that a total of eleven hospitals and business units under MedStar Health's umbrella have received the prestigious 2025 Wellness at Work Recognition from the Healthiest Maryland Businesses program. This achievement sets a new record for the prominent healthcare provider in the region. The commendation was granted by the Maryland Department of Health, highlighting MedStar Health's commitment to promoting and maintaining wellness in the workplace.

data.title: Prebiotic fiber market set to hit USD 2.3B by 2031, growing from USD 1.78B in 2024. Boom in gut health driving demand.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of August 25, 2025, the global prebiotic fiber market shows promising growth potential for the period 2025-2031. Reports indicate that in 2024, the market was valued at around USD 1,780 million and is expected to increase to approximately USD 2,346 million by 2031.
